narrative:
Lake Twp East (precinct in Wood County) has 1,177 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.8 percentage points.
